pi_items.source: install_ugene.sh explicitly downloads from rest.uniprot.org using accessions P68871 and P02112.
UniProt query confirms P68871 is Hemoglobin subunit beta OS=Homo sapiens.
UniProt query confirms P02112 is Hemoglobin subunit beta OS=Gallus gallus.
Biopython script on extracted sequence data confirms both P68871 and P02112 are exactly 147 amino acids long.
verifier.py checks if the identity is >= 55%. A direct alignment calculates true identity at 69.4%.
verifier.py checks if the identity is <= 80%. A direct alignment calculates true identity at 69.4%.

privileged_info_summary: The data is non-synthetic and consists of real UniProt hemoglobin beta protein sequences downloaded via the UniProt API. Human accession P68871 and Chicken accession P02112 both correspond to the correct proteins and are exactly 147 amino acids long. A manual pairwise alignment between these two sequences using a BLOSUM62 matrix yields an actual identity of roughly 69.4%, which falls precisely within the 55% to 80% identity bounds configured in the verifier script.
